title: Control frontmatter schema
description: Schema for CTRL artifacts — enforceable, auditable statements derived from business requirements (BRQ). Lives in 01-product/controls/ as part of the Compliance tier (obligation stack: BRQ → BR → CTRL → FR/NFR). Core fields only; audit-extension fields (evidence_type, evidence_location, audit_status, control_family) are added at verification stage. Reverse links (derived_requirements, verified_by) are computed by the traceability script.

status.description: identified: control need recognized; defined: control statement written; allocated: derived FR/NFR created; implemented: all derived FR/NFR implemented; verified: evidence collected and confirmed; audited: external or internal audit passed; deprecated: no longer applicable

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ artifacts this control enforces

verification_method.description: How compliance with this control is verified (INCOSE verification methods)

compliance_deadline.description: Date by which this control must be verified (YYYY-MM-DD)
